versions.command: F:\WorkDir\locma\.venv\Scripts\locma depot publish fvi-study runs/fvi_s0.zip runs/fvi_s1.zip runs/fvi_s2.zip runs/fvi2_s0.zip runs/fvi2_s1.zip runs/fvi2_s2.zip runs/fviaz2_s0.zip runs/fviaz2_s1.zip runs/fviaz2_s2.zip runs/fviaz10_s0.zip runs/fviaz10_s1.zip runs/fviaz10_s2.zip --kind model --parent b0@1 --note E5 variant 2 FVI study bundle (PR #57, closed, both flavors null/negative). Critic-branch-only fine-tunes of depot:b0 -- policy path byte-identical. Flavors: fvi_sX = MC targets 10ep (vbeam play delta -0.086), fvi2_sX = MC 2ep (-0.009), fviaz2/fviaz10_sX = AZ backed-up targets 2/10ep (-0.007 @10ep; pre-training Bellman residual 0.019 MSE -- b0 critic is a fixed point of its own one-step beam backup). Archival: regenerable from depot:b0 + locma/envs/vbeam_fvi.py collectors. --meta {"verdict": "null-to-negative", "study": "E5v2 FVI", "pr": 57, "vbeam_play_delta": {"fvi_10ep": -0.086, "fvi2_2ep": -0.009, "fviaz10_10ep": -0.007}}
